pi_items.source: Code analysis: setup_task.sh creates applications with partner_name='James Miller'; export_result.sh queries for partner_name='James Miller'

Code analysis: setup_task.sh creates/searches for job with name='Trainee' (line 31); all applications linked to Trainee job (line 57); task description explicitly states 'Archive his 3 active applications for the Trainee position'
Code analysis: setup_task.sh creates 3 applications in for loop (line 52: range(1,4)); verifier.py expects archived_count==3 (line 63); export_result.sh verifies total_count==3 (line 53)

privileged_info_summary: Task archive_withdrawn_applications operates on synthetic data created during setup. The task involves archiving 3 applications for candidate 'James Miller' for the 'Trainee' job position. All metadata values are verified: candidate name is 'James Miller', job position is 'Trainee', and exactly 3 applications are created and must be archived.
